source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-155 Risk Management/A-TCF-5-105 FMEA Table (rev.1).xlsx

document.title: FMEA Report
document.documentType: FMEA Table / Risk Management FMEA Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: FMEA Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW, Rev. 1 dated December 02, 2022.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports risk management documentation by identifying hazards, estimating and evaluating risks, defining risk control measures, and evaluating residual risk acceptability.
keyPoints: The report applies EN ISO 14971(2019) and IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013.
Revision history states Rev. 1 dated 2022.12.02 applied EN ISO 14971:2019.
The product is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW.
The document references risk controls including labels, user manual, certified battery, IEC 60601-1 testing, cable differentiation, IEC 62304 software process, and EMC testing.
Residual risks are repeatedly evaluated as acceptable after control implementation and verification.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Name,:,Digital faly panel X-ray detector

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: The H&abyz Co., Ltd. figured out the intended purpose and the characteristics related to the safety of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: IEC 62304
entities.evidence: establishing software development process in accordance with IEC 62304

concepts.name: Risk management process
concepts.evidence: Risk Management Process for ME Equipment or ME Systems,A,See Risk Management Report (Doc. No. A-TCF-5-104).

concepts.name: Essential performance
concepts.evidence: Manufacturer shall identify which functions are Essential Performance.

concepts.name: Expected service life
concepts.evidence: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.

concepts.name: Single fault condition
concepts.evidence: Single Fault Condition for ME Equipment,A

concepts.name: Risk control measures
concepts.evidence: As control measures for the identified risks, providing label and user manual, using certified battery, testing the device to meet IEC 60601-1, designing each cable type differently, establishing software development process in accordance with IEC 62304, etc were implemented and verified.

concepts.name: Residual risk acceptability
concepts.evidence: After all risk control measures have been implemented and verified, the residual risks within the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector is reduced in the acceptable region

concepts.name: Electromagnetic compatibility
concepts.evidence: 17,Electromagnetic compatibility of ME equipment and ME systems ,A,This equipment generates electromagnetic wave and uses in environment generated electromagnetic wave.

evidence.claim: The document is an FMEA Report.
The report revision date is December 02, 2022.
The report covers Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText:
Product Name,:,Digital faly panel X-ray detector
Model Name,:,A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The device is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.

evidence.claim: The product has a rechargeable battery.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW has the rechargeable battery.

evidence.claim: The product has a rechargeable battery and power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW has the rechargeable battery and power supply.

evidence.claim: The product does not produce diagnostic or therapeutic X-radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW does not produce the x-radiation for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes.

evidence.claim: The product does not have moving parts.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW does not have moving parts.

evidence.claim: Software development process was established in accordance with IEC 62304.
evidence.evidenceText: Software development process established in accordance with IEC 62304 includes software requirements specifications and software validation was performed.

evidence.claim: Data transmission is made from the device to the PC.
evidence.evidenceText: 14.13,PEMS intended to be incorporated into an IT-Network,A,Data transmission is made from the device to the PC.

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity controls include ID/password restriction for wireless network access.
evidence.evidenceText: Restrict random access by setting id / pw when connecting to Wireless network

evidence.claim: Transmission data protection includes encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, and WPAPSK+TKIP.
evidence.evidenceText: Transmission data is protected by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: Overall residual risks are determined to be acceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: Finally, the overall residual risks are determined to be acceptable through the waning, operating method and adverse event reporting.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; source metadata authoritySignal says MFDS/domestic while the sourcePath references CE MDR.
The controlled/uncontrolled checkbox line is present but no selected document control status is clear.
Source text contains multiple apparent OCR or extraction quality issues, including 'Digital faly panel', 'hazzards', 'measeres', 'waning', 'date cable', and 'indicatior'.
Product name appears with a typo in the source text, but the intended wording is supported elsewhere by repeated references to Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
